steps.title: Identify the emphasis on local sourcing
steps.content: Every example highlights local sourcing: Begay uses Arizona plants, Arizona dock roots, and clay from nearby soil. The passage repeatedly shows her drawing materials from her immediate environment.

steps.title: Apply to the answer choices
steps.content: Begay draws on local resources in the approach she uses to dye wool. directly states the main idea. The text says Begay uses "plants and vegetables from Arizona" and "clay obtained from nearby soil," so choice B captures the whole passage. Choice A focuses too narrowly on colors in one rug, choice C invents a difficulty, and choice D adds acclaim and techniques that the text never mentions. That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
